amendmentPolicy: Free changes up to 24 hours before departure with a flexible ticket.
cancellationPolicy: Full refund if canceled 24+ hours in advance.

amendmentPolicy: No amendment fees with Flexi; fare difference may apply.
Economy fares are subject to amendment feess. Flexi bookings allowing free amendments prior to departure.
cancellationPolicy: Economy fares are subject to 100% cancellation fee.

amendmentPolicy: Economy fares are subject to an amendment fee. Other fares can make changes withut incurring a charge.
cancellationPolicy: No refunds for cancellation on economy fares. Other fares will recieve a refund but may stil lbe subject to cancellation fees.

amendmentPolicy: Free changes up to 24 hours before departure.
cancellationPolicy: Free changes up to 24 hours before departure.

amendmentPolicy: Free online amendments with a standard ticket, all changes need to be made before you travel.
cancellationPolicy: FREE cancellation up to 48 hours before departure with a standard ticket

amendmentPolicy: Free changes up to 24 hours before departure with a flexible ticket.
cancellationPolicy: Full refund if canceled 24+ hours in advance.

amendmentPolicy: Amendments to a standard ticket can be made up to 1 hour before sailing, any ticket increases must be paid for and any decreases will be refunded.
cancellationPolicy: For a £5 fee you can get a full refund on a standard ticket  as long as you cancel more than 24 hours in advance of your outbound sailing.
